name: Santa Maria Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Fresh Tomatoes; Peeled And Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the canned tomatoes with scissors and mix with the other ingredients.
2. Turn into a bowl or jar and cover tightly.
3. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight to blend the flavors.
4. Serve at room temperature as a side dish with meats, beans, and barbecue.
5. Any leftovers can be refrigerated for several days.
